name: polymath-connector-jira
description: Jira connector: MCP server for issues + UserPromptSubmit hook that detects PROJ-123 keys and hints at issue fetch.

jiraUrl.title: Jira base URL
jiraUrl.description: Your Jira Cloud base URL (e.g. https://example.atlassian.net).

jiraEmail.title: Atlassian email
jiraEmail.description: Email associated with the Atlassian account.

jiraApiToken.title: Atlassian API token
jiraApiToken.description: API token from id.atlassian.com → Security → API tokens.
